allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import sqlite3; from pathlib import Path; import json; projects_dir = Path\(''data/projects''\); [print\(f''=== {db_path.name} ===''\) or [print\(f''ID: {row[0]}, Status: {row[5]}''\) or print\(f''  Problem: {row[3][:80]}...''\) or print\(f''  Solution: {row[4][:80]}...''\) or print\(f''  Files: {row[9]}''\) or print\(f''  MsgRange: {row[11]}-{row[12]} \({row[13]} msgs\)''\) or print\(\) for row in sqlite3.connect\(db_path\).execute\(''SELECT * FROM decisions ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5''\).fetchall\(\)] or print\(''  No decisions\\n''\) for db_path in projects_dir.glob\(''*.db''\)]")
